description: You are a Data Engineer migrating a legacy ETL process to Docker. Containerize the application in `~/projects/legacy-etl/` so that the Python script `ingest.py` executes every minute via the system `cron` daemon. The resulting image must be named `legacy-etl:latest`. The configuration must ensure that environment variables `API_ENDPOINT` and `API_TOKEN` passed at runtime are accessible to the cron job and that all cron job output is redirected to the container's standard output for visibility in `docker logs`.
